Off Calendar May-29-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF TELEFLORA'S Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Dismissal is taken Off Calender per request of the moving party. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion Of Plaintiffs Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Dismissal
Off Calendar May-15-2015 Continued To May-29-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
D. Marcolini, of Law Offices of Steven Booska, Tel. 415.568.0742, for plaintiffs;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The Court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows: PLAINTIFF TELEFLORA'S Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Dismissal is continued to May 29, 2015, at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302, to allow further briefing on the matter.
